title: Requirement
description: A Stakeholder-submitted requirement entering the Engineering OS pipeline at Stage 1.

items.description: Region/locale code(s) this requirement affects (via the RegionAdapter seam), e.g. an ISO 3166 code or a region grouping defined in the Product Canon.

feature_class.description: Pipeline lane, assigned by the Engineering Advisor at Stage 1. express = trivial change with zero trigger-surface touch (skips Architect, Security, Final-review); standard = normal feature, no trigger surface; high-stakes = touches a trigger surface (full pipeline + mutation tests + 2 personas + mandatory Security Reviewer VETO). See docs/feature-tiering.md.

feature_class_rationale.description: One-line justification for the assigned feature_class, naming the classifier rule applied and any trigger surfaces touched.

trigger_surfaces_touched.description: High-stakes surfaces this requirement touches (declared in the Product Canon's TRIGGER-SURFACES.md). MUST be empty for feature_class=express; any entry forces high-stakes. Mirrors the Security Reviewer's review triggers.

target_user.description: Persona + tier (e.g., 'Stakeholder of a mid-market product', 'Finance lead of an enterprise account').

linked_runs.description: Run folder paths if this requirement has prior runs.
